sources.name: OddsPortal NBA historical results and odds
sources.coverage_claim: NBA season pages visible from 1998-99 onward as of 2026-07-17

legal_review.summary: Terms restrict use to personal use and prohibit unapproved extraction, scraping, aggregation, recreation and automated requests.

sources.notes: Use only for manual spot checks; never use as an automated historical odds feed.

sources.name: SportsbookReviewOnline legacy NBA odds archive
sources.notes: Use mirrored datasets only after license, provenance and schema review.

sources.name: Covers Sports Odds History - NBA
sources.notes: Not suitable for game-level moneyline, T-60m, Closing or CLV backtests.

sources.name: Kaggle - Christopher Treasure NBA Odds Data
sources.provenance: Dataset description references SportsbookReviewOnline legacy archive
sources.notes: First candidate for closing-market benchmark; never treat as exact point-in-time entry odds.

sources.name: Kaggle - Evan Hallmark NBA Historical Stats and Betting Data
sources.coverage_claim: Multiple betting and NBA data CSV files; dataset page is several years old
sources.notes: Do not place in automated pipeline until license and provenance are clarified.

sources.name: Kaggle - Eric Qiu NBA Odds and Scores
sources.coverage_claim: Most of the previous decade, regular season and playoffs
sources.provenance: Description says compiled from various sources
sources.notes: CC0 label does not remove the need for provenance and timestamp-quality checks.

sources.name: Kaggle datasets derived from OddsPortal scraping
sources.notes: A downloadable mirror does not override original website terms or database rights.
